app.title: BooksForge
app.tagline: Local-first writing app with on-device AI agents.
common.error.title: Something went wrong
ollama.wizard.title: Set up Ollama
ollama.wizard.intro: Ollama runs the local language models that BooksForge uses.  Your manuscript never leaves your device.
project.picker.title: Open a project
project.wizard.title: New project
project.wizard.field.title: Project title
project.wizard.field.author: Author
binder.empty: Drag a chapter here, or use ⌘N to create your first scene.
snapshot.timeline.title: Snapshots
snapshot.timeline.empty: No snapshots yet — they're created automatically before agent edits.
snapshot.create.title: Take a snapshot
snapshot.restore.title: Restore snapshot
snapshot.restore.confirm: Replace current state with this snapshot?  A safety snapshot will be taken before the restore.
agents.panel.title: Agents
export.dialog.title: Export
settings.title: Settings
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
settings.diagnostics.crashReports.descri: Off by default.  When enabled, reports are queued for your review before any send — nothing leaves your device automatically.
settings.privacy.title: Privacy
settings.privacy.aiConsent.description: BooksForge runs AI agents locally via Ollama.  Enabling AI for this project lets agents read your manuscript on this machine; no content is transmitted off-device.
shortcut.help.title: Keyboard shortcuts
